request: Give me a general overview of our customers.
search_document:
User Request: Give me a general overview of our customers.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customer Distribution by Region
Type: chart
Description: Overview of customers segmented by geographical region
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: table
Description: Summary of customer types and their descriptions
Title: Total Number of Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total count of unique customers
Title: Customer Growth Over Time
Type: chart
Description: Trend of new customers acquired over the last year

sql_queries.title: Customer Distribution by Region
sql_queries.description: Overview of customers segmented by geographical region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Region", COUNT("CustomerID") AS "CustomerCount" FROM "Customers" GROUP BY "Region"

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.description: Summary of customer types and their descriptions

sql_queries.title: Customer Growth Over Time
sql_queries.description: Trend of new customers acquired over the last year
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', "OrderDate") AS "Month", COUNT(DISTINCT "CustomerID") AS "NewCustomers" FROM "Orders" WHERE "OrderDate" >= date('now', '-1 year') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', "OrderDate") ORDER BY "Month"
